America’s Debt Just Hit a WWII-Era Record While the Economy Booms: The Trap Nobody’s Talking About
results.description: The U.S. economy is growing at a healthy clip, yet the country is running deficits that history only associates with wartime emergencies. What that combination means for the next recession is a question nobody in Washington seems eager to answer.

results.title: How to Play DAL Stock After Delta's Strong Q2 Earnings Results
results.description: Delta Air Lines stock sinks despite market-beating Q2 earnings. Bernstein analyst and options traders recommend buying the dip in DAL shares.

results.title: Kingston and realtor settle over removal of Pike Plan canopies
results.description: KINGSTON – Mayor Steven Noble announced than Kingston and William Gottlieb Real Estate have reached “a mutually agreeable settlement” over the removal of the Pike Plan canopies. The settlement resolves “all outstanding legal disputes” and “marks a constructive step forward,” the mayor said on Friday. He said the settlement includes that William Gottlieb Real Estate [...]

results.title: Waymo Announces Expansion To Four Cities—How To Earn Rewards On Your Driverless Rides
results.description: The ride-hailing company Waymo might be bringing cars—but not drivers—to your city soon. The driverless ride-hailing service announced on July 8 it’s expanding to four new cities: Denver, Las Vegas, San Diego and Tampa, Florida. Fully autonomous rides will be first available for the company’s employees, then expand to the public “soon,” according to a [...]

results.title: Africa’s richest man takes $2billion infrastructure push to one of the continent’s smallest economies
results.description: Africa’s richest man, Aliko Dangote, is extending his infrastructure investment drive across the continent with a proposed $2 billion commitment to transform The Gambia’s power and fuel sectors, reinforcing his ambition to build industrial assets beyond Nigeria.

results.title: Status of projects under PMJVK, BDP reviewed
